summary: This is a brief announcement post where Cathy O'Neil shares that her book 'Weapons of Math Destruction' was discussed on her Slate Money podcast. The post serves purely as a promotional notice directing readers to listen to the episode. No substantive arguments or analysis are presented in the post itself.
key_points: O'Neil appeared on Slate Money podcast to discuss her book
The post promotes 'Weapons of Math Destruction' with a link to purchase
Readers are directed to listen to the full podcast episode for the actual discussion
key_insight: This is a promotional announcement post with no substantive content to analyze beyond directing readers to a podcast discussion of her book.
